artifacts.description: Parser, rectangular unit-distance mask builder, FFT verifier, and local-search probes grounded in paper grid/parallelogram.
91 accepted bonus-to-real fills; verified by script to keep zero same-color unit-distance conflicts.
JSON version of the 91-fill candidate including verification metadata.
Separate two-cell one-step repair, verified alone to keep zero conflicts.
Full-resolution mask, conflict, safety, and local-search summary.
5x coarsened subsample results showing many conflicts and no safe single fills.
